snippet.name: backward_difference_derivative
snippet.function:
if (is_first) then is_first = false prevX = time prevY = value end
dx = time - prevX dy = value - prevY prevX = time prevY = value
return dy/dx

snippet.name: central_difference_derivative
snippet.global: firstX = 0 firstY = 0 is_first = true secondX = 0 secondY = 0 is_second = false
snippet.function:
-- Wait for initial values if (is_first) then is_first = false is_second = true firstX = time firstY = value end
if (is_second) then is_second = false secondX = time secondY = value end
-- Central derivative: dy/dx ~= f(x+delta_x)-f(x-delta_x)/(2*delta_x) dx = time - firstX dy = value - firstY -- Increment firstX = secondX firstY = secondY secondX = time secondY = value
return dy/dx

snippet.name: 01_moving_average_single_signal
snippet.function:
if (moving_average_window < 1) then moving_average_window = 1 end if (moving_average_window > 15) then moving_average_window = 15 end
table.insert(moving_average_buffer, value) moving_average_sum = moving_average_sum + value
if (#moving_average_buffer > moving_average_window) then moving_average_sum = moving_average_sum - moving_average_buffer[1] table.remove(moving_average_buffer, 1) end
return moving_average_sum / #moving_average_buffer

snippet.name: 02_first_order_low_pass_filter
snippet.function:
if (dvx_low_pass_filter_alpha < 0) then dvx_low_pass_filter_alpha = 0 end if (dvx_low_pass_filter_alpha > 1) then dvx_low_pass_filter_alpha = 1 end
delta_v = value
if (not dvx_low_pass_initialized) then prev_delta_v_filtered = delta_v dvx_low_pass_initialized = true return prev_delta_v_filtered end
filtered_delta_v = dvx_low_pass_filter_alpha * prev_delta_v_filtered + (1 - dvx_low_pass_filter_alpha) * delta_v prev_delta_v_filtered = filtered_delta_v
return filtered_delta_v

snippet.name: integral
snippet.function:
if (is_first) then is_first = false prevX = time end
dx = time - prevX prevX = time
integral = integral + value*dx
return integral

snippet.name: remove_offset
snippet.function:
if (is_first) then is_first = false first_value = value end
return value - first_value

snippet.name: quat_to_roll
snippet.function:
w = value x = v1 y = v2 z = v3
dcm21 = 2 * (w * x + y * z) dcm22 = w*w - x*x - y*y + z*z
roll = math.atan2(dcm21, dcm22)
return roll

snippet.name: quat_to_pitch
snippet.function:
w = value x = v1 y = v2 z = v3
dcm20 = 2 * (x * z - w * y)
pitch = math.asin(-dcm20)
return pitch

snippet.name: quat_to_yaw
snippet.function:
w = value x = v1 y = v2 z = v3
dcm10 = 2 * (x * y + w * z) dcm00 = w*w + x*x - y*y - z*z
yaw = math.atan2(dcm10, dcm00)
return yaw
